'''''Star Wars: Demolition'': Prima's Official Strategy Guide''' was a strategy book for [[Star Wars: Demolition]] by [[David Hodgson]]. It was published by [[Prima Games|Prima Publishing]] and released on [[November 16]] [[2000]].

The guide detailed coverage of both the PlayStation and Dreamcast versions of the game. It contained detailed maps, including all of the Power-up locations, generators and combat droids to assist you through out the game. Also included were comprehensive level descriptions and environment overview along with topographical studies. A combat tips section was included for help to beat the more difficult foes of the game, as well as tips on exploiting weaknesses.

All weapons and vehicles, and their effects, were covered later in the book. The last section contained game secrets from the "masters".
